name: @basedchef/contextkit-cli
description: Secure CLI for ContextKit versioned skill repositories.
author: basedchef

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node --input-type=module -e "import { chmodSync } from 'node:fs'; chmodSync('dist/cli.js', 0o755)"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
